name: Braemar Golf Dome
about: Braemar Golf Dome offers a comprehensive golf simulation experience with both indoor and outdoor facilities. The venue features a golf dome with Toptracer technology, a championship 18-hole course, an Academy 9 course, and a driving range. It caters to a wide range of golfers, from beginners to serious players, with various practice options, leagues, and instruction programs. The facility is known for its public accessibility in Minnesota and supports events, outings, and adaptive programs, making it a versatile destination for both individual and group golf activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Toptracer technology for accurate shot tracking
Variety of course options including championship and academy layouts
Extensive instruction programs for all skill levels
Flexible event and outing hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food and beverage service available
Full bar service available at the venue

simulator_hardware.notes: Toptracer technology integrated into the driving range

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink may not be allowed, as the venue offers on-site food and beverage services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator play times vary depending on group size and pace, but typically 18 holes take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Braemar Golf Dome offers junior golf programs and is designed to accommodate families and youth players.
